testsuite.name: tests.LoginTest

testcase.name: TC_Login_Combined_001_to_030
testcase.system-out: Starting Merged Login Execution: TC_LOGIN_001 to TC_LOGIN_030 TC_LOGIN_001 - PASSED: URL routing displays login correctly TC_LOGIN_002 - PASSED: Username field availability verified TC_LOGIN_003 - PASSED: Password field availability verified TC_LOGIN_004 - PASSED: Username field placeholder text verified TC_LOGIN_005 - PASSED: Password field placeholder text verified TC_LOGIN_006 - PASSED: Login button enabled state verified TC_LOGIN_007 - PASSED: Username input accepted perfectly TC_LOGIN_008 - PASSED: Password input accepted perfectly TC_LOGIN_009 - PASSED: Password mask confirmed TC_LOGIN_018 - PASSED: Username accepts alphanumeric TC_LOGIN_019 - PASSED: Username accepts special configurations TC_LOGIN_020 - PASSED: Password alphanumeric tests executed TC_LOGIN_021 - PASSED: Password special char variations executed TC_LOGIN_024 - PASSED: OrangeHRM logo rendering successfully TC_LOGIN_026 - PASSED: Username field max length constrained TC_LOGIN_027 - PASSED: Password field max length constrained TC_LOGIN_030 - PASSED: Responsive window resizing intact TC_LOGIN_016 - PASSED: Forgot Password link rendered TC_LOGIN_017 - PASSED: Forgot Password interactable logic functioning TC_LOGIN_022 - PASSED: Tab navigation routes perfectly between inputs TC_LOGIN_023 - PASSED: ENTER Keypress fires Login submission TC_LOGIN_013 - PASSED: Handled both empty fields seamlessly TC_LOGIN_014 - PASSED: Username required flag triggered TC_LOGIN_015 - PASSED: Password required flag triggered TC_LOGIN_011 - PASSED: Handled Invalid User TC_LOGIN_012 - PASSED: Handled Invalid Pass TC_LOGIN_025 - PASSED: SQL Injection perfectly blockaded TC_LOGIN_028 - PASSED: Case sensitivity strictly enforced TC_LOGIN_010 - PASSED: System accepts configured valid credentials TC_LOGIN_029 - PASSED: Post logout validation and Back-Button manipulation defended COMPLETED: All 30 exact mapped Login scenarios executed.

testsuite.system-out: Starting Merged Login Execution: TC_LOGIN_001 to TC_LOGIN_030 TC_LOGIN_001 - PASSED: URL routing displays login correctly TC_LOGIN_002 - PASSED: Username field availability verified TC_LOGIN_003 - PASSED: Password field availability verified TC_LOGIN_004 - PASSED: Username field placeholder text verified TC_LOGIN_005 - PASSED: Password field placeholder text verified TC_LOGIN_006 - PASSED: Login button enabled state verified TC_LOGIN_007 - PASSED: Username input accepted perfectly TC_LOGIN_008 - PASSED: Password input accepted perfectly TC_LOGIN_009 - PASSED: Password mask confirmed TC_LOGIN_018 - PASSED: Username accepts alphanumeric TC_LOGIN_019 - PASSED: Username accepts special configurations TC_LOGIN_020 - PASSED: Password alphanumeric tests executed TC_LOGIN_021 - PASSED: Password special char variations executed TC_LOGIN_024 - PASSED: OrangeHRM logo rendering successfully TC_LOGIN_026 - PASSED: Username field max length constrained TC_LOGIN_027 - PASSED: Password field max length constrained TC_LOGIN_030 - PASSED: Responsive window resizing intact TC_LOGIN_016 - PASSED: Forgot Password link rendered TC_LOGIN_017 - PASSED: Forgot Password interactable logic functioning TC_LOGIN_022 - PASSED: Tab navigation routes perfectly between inputs TC_LOGIN_023 - PASSED: ENTER Keypress fires Login submission TC_LOGIN_013 - PASSED: Handled both empty fields seamlessly TC_LOGIN_014 - PASSED: Username required flag triggered TC_LOGIN_015 - PASSED: Password required flag triggered TC_LOGIN_011 - PASSED: Handled Invalid User TC_LOGIN_012 - PASSED: Handled Invalid Pass TC_LOGIN_025 - PASSED: SQL Injection perfectly blockaded TC_LOGIN_028 - PASSED: Case sensitivity strictly enforced TC_LOGIN_010 - PASSED: System accepts configured valid credentials TC_LOGIN_029 - PASSED: Post logout validation and Back-Button manipulation defended COMPLETED: All 30 exact mapped Login scenarios executed.
